footer.description: The free reference guide to master Claude Code. Created by the community, for the community. No paywall, no tracking, just shared knowledge.

search.placeholder: Search for a topic, a page...

hero.title: Master
hero.subtitle: The reference guide to harness the full power of AI in your daily work. Whether you're a developer, entrepreneur or simply curious, it all starts here.
hero.terminalPrompt: Build me a modern website with a landing page,
hero.terminalPrompt2: an authentication system and an admin dashboard.
hero.terminalResponse: Sure! I'll create your project step by step...

features.title: What you can do with Claude Code
features.description: Claude Code is not just a chatbot. It's a creative partner that understands your context and acts in your environment.

audience.title: No matter your profile, Claude Code is made for you
audience.description: AI is no longer reserved for engineers. Every creative, ambitious or simply curious person can benefit from it.

paths.title: Choose your path
paths.description: Three paths adapted to your level. Start where you are, progress at your own pace.

configurator.title: Your custom setup in 2 minutes
configurator.description: No need to read everything. Answer a few questions and get a personalized configuration, ready to use.

cta.title: Ready to transform the way you
cta.description: The guide is free, open-source and built to last. Start now and join a community that pushes the boundaries of what's possible.

createWebsite.title: Create a website
createWebsite.description: From landing page to full e-commerce, Claude Code generates, structures and deploys your web projects.

generateDocs.title: Generate documents
generateDocs.description: Reports, presentations, technical documentation: let AI structure and write for you.

automate.title: Automate your tasks
automate.description: Scripts, CI/CD pipelines, data migrations. Turn hours of work into minutes.

analyzeData.title: Analyze data
analyzeData.description: Connect your sources, explore your datasets and get insights in natural language.

codeNoDev.title: Code without being a dev
codeNoDev.description: Describe what you want in plain language. Claude Code translates your ideas into working code.

designUI.title: Design interfaces
designUI.description: Create modern and accessible interfaces by simply describing your vision.

connectTools.title: Connect your tools
connectTools.description: With MCPs, integrate Gmail, Slack, GitHub, databases and much more.

deploy.title: Deploy to production
deploy.description: Docker, CI/CD, monitoring: Claude Code handles your infrastructure from A to Z.

developers.title: Developers
developers.description: Accelerate your workflow 10x. Code review, refactoring, automated tests, assisted debugging. Your ultimate copilot.

entrepreneurs.title: Entrepreneurs
entrepreneurs.description: Launch your MVP in days instead of weeks. Prototype, iterate and deploy without a tech team.

creatives.title: Creatives & Designers
creatives.description: Transform your mockups into living websites. Generate animations, custom UI components.

students.title: Students
students.description: Learn by doing. Claude Code explains every concept, fixes your mistakes and guides you step by step.

curious.title: Curious & Self-taught
curious.description: Explore the world of code without prerequisites. Ask questions, experiment, create your first projects.

teams.title: Teams & Managers
teams.description: Standardize your workflows, auto-document, and give superpowers to your entire team.

beginner.title: The fundamentals
beginner.description: Never used Claude Code? Perfect. We start from zero, together.
items: Understand the terminal and the basics
Your first guided project step by step

intermediate.title: Tool mastery
intermediate.description: You know how to use Claude Code? Discover MCPs, Skills and advanced prompting.
items: Connect your favorite tools via MCPs
Prompting techniques that make a difference

advanced.title: Expert & Architect
advanced.description: Push Claude Code to its limits. Multi-agents, complex workflows, deployments.

metadata.siteDescription: The free reference guide to master Claude Code. MCP, Skills, Advanced Prompting, for developers and non-developers.
